allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem D:\\signease\\frontend | Where-Object { $_.Name -ne 'node_modules' } | Format-List Name, FullName)
PowerShell(python -c "from mediapipe.tasks import python as mp_tasks; from mediapipe.tasks.python import vision as mp_vision; print\('Tasks API OK'\)" 2>&1)
PowerShell(Start-Process cmd -ArgumentList "/k cd /d D:\\signease\\python-service && python -m uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8001" -WindowStyle Normal; Write-Output "Python window launched")
PowerShell(try { Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:8000/api/history" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 | Select-Object StatusCode, Content } catch { "Laravel error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep 4; try { Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:8000/api/history" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 | Select-Object StatusCode, Content } catch { "Still not ready: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
PowerShell(try { Invoke-WebRequest "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/history" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 | Select-Object StatusCode, Content } catch { "error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
